archetype.name: Blessed One
archetype.note: This archetype offers Affliction Mercy at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Affliction Mercy
feat.text: The divine grace that flows through you grants reprieve from an affliction. Add mercy of recuperation to the types of mercy you can provide, allowing you to counteract an affliction instead of an effect causing a condition (typically an affliction is a curse, disease, or poison).

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
